title: Signature Hall of Fame
description: Marie was inducted into Signature's Hall of Fame — the highest recognition in the BSL interpreting industry — for outstanding contribution to interpreting services and Deaf access.

title: Landmark Legal Precedent
description: Our testimony in the landmark Little Mix BSL case helped establish that BSL access at live events is a legal requirement under the Equality Act 2010 — not optional.

title: Trusted for National Moments
description: Selected to manage and deliver Deaf access for Royal events and state ceremonies — BSL, captions and looping systems.

title: Proactive Access at Wembley
description: Working with Wembley Stadium to provide BSL interpreting at every event — without waiting for a customer request. Access by default, not by exception.
